pe:description: Six-phase end-to-end pipeline: extract design tokens from Figma via MCP, classify into three-tier cascade (Primitive/Semantic/Component), validate against DS-ONT business rules, populate DS instance JSONLD, commit and deploy to GitHub Pages, and verify live accessibility. Eliminates manual post-population steps.
pe:businessObjective: Fully automated design-to-data-to-deployment flow: Figma source of truth into ontology-compliant instance data, committed, pushed, and verified live — zero manual intervention after invocation.
pe:scope: Single Figma file key per brand variant; outputs one DS instance JSONLD per execution; updates registry entry; commits, pushes, and verifies GitHub Pages deployment.

pe:inputs.pe:name: Figma File Key
pe:inputs.pe:description: The Figma file key for the target brand's design system (e.g. JowntVHgYzfuZmaLHNRVTZ for RCS)

pe:inputs.pe:name: Brand Identifier
pe:inputs.pe:description: Lowercase brand slug used for file naming and registry entry (e.g. rcs, pand, wwg)

pe:inputs.pe:name: Brand Display Name
pe:inputs.pe:description: Human-readable brand name for pfiInstanceName field (e.g. RCS, PAND, WWG)

pe:inputs.pe:name: Figma File URL
pe:inputs.pe:description: Full Figma design URL for provenance tracking in extraction log and FigmaSource entity

pe:hasPhase.pe:description: Call Figma MCP tools on target file to extract raw design token data. Handles both Variables API (get_variable_defs) and visual swatch files (get_metadata + get_design_context fallback).
pe:hasPhase.pe:entryConditions: figmaFileKey provided; Figma MCP authenticated and connected
pe:hasPhase.pe:exitConditions: Raw extraction data contains colour, spacing, and radius tokens; extraction log started
pe:activities: 1. Call get_metadata(fileKey, nodeId=0:1) to discover page structure and enumerate section node IDs (Colour Tokens, Typography, Size/Radii/Borders sections).

2. For each discovered section node, call get_variable_defs(fileKey, nodeId=<sectionNodeId>) to extract token name/value pairs. IMPORTANT: get_variable_defs returns empty on root page 0:1 — section-level node IDs are required.
3. If get_variable_defs returns empty for a section, fallback to get_design_context(fileKey, nodeId) to extract hex values from CSS/Tailwind output.
4. Record all extracted token name/value pairs, source node IDs, and section membership in extraction log JSON.
5. Note any brand-specific anomalies (e.g. overlapping token names across sections, distinct surface vs border hex values).

pe:knownPatterns.primaryStrategy: Always call get_metadata first to discover section node IDs, then get_variable_defs on each section. Never call get_variable_defs on root page 0:1 — it returns empty.
pe:knownPatterns.baivNodeIDs: BAIV (bXCyfNwzc8Z9kEeFIeIB8C): ColourTokens=1:29, Primary=1:30, Secondary=26:209, Error=25:140, Warning=26:163, Success=26:186, Information=26:232, Accent=26:278, Greyscale=1:53, Typography=106:198, Size=59:184
pe:knownPatterns.tokenYield: BAIV yields ~153 raw tokens across 11 section nodes (~134 after deduplication): 94 colour, 23 typography, 25 size/radii/borders, 11 greyscale/neutral
pe:knownPatterns.fallbackStrategy: If get_variable_defs returns empty for a specific section node, fallback to get_design_context on that section to extract hex values from CSS output

pe:hasPhase.pe:description: Classify extracted Figma variables into Primitive, Semantic, and Component tiers per DS-ONT TokenTier enumeration using codified classification ruleset DS-CLASSIFY-001.
pe:hasPhase.pe:entryConditions: Raw extraction data from Phase 1 available; DS-CLASSIFY-001 ruleset loaded
pe:hasPhase.pe:exitConditions: All tokens classified into exactly one tier; tier counts logged; excludePatterns applied
pe:activities: 1. Load classification ruleset from ds-token-classification-rules.json (DS-CLASSIFY-001).
2. For each extracted token, apply sectionToTierMap: match the source section name to determine default tier (Primitive/Semantic) and semantic group (primary, error, neutral, etc.).
3. Apply variableNameToTokenName mappings: convert Figma slash-paths (Surface/Subtle, Font Family/Font Headings) to DS-ONT dot-paths (primary.surface.subtle, typography.fontFamily.headings).
4. Apply excludePatterns: remove noise variables (lrg duplicates, Background/ duplicates, var(--sds-*) system refs, YellowBdr/ duplicates).
5. Apply valueTypeInference: determine ds:valueType (Color/Typography/Spacing/Radius/Border) from value format if not explicitly mapped.
6. Generate TokenCategory entries per DS-ONT schema (colors, typography, spacing, borderRadius, surface, border, text, component).
7. Log tier counts and deduplication stats; verify within expectedYields range.

pe:hasPhase.pe:description: Validate classified tokens against DS-ONT business rules BR-DS-001 through BR-DS-008 using codified validation ruleset DS-VALIDATE-001.
pe:hasPhase.pe:entryConditions: Classified token arrays from Phase 2 available; DS-VALIDATE-001 ruleset loaded
pe:hasPhase.pe:exitConditions: Zero severity=error violations; warnings documented in extraction log
pe:activities: 1. Load validation ruleset from ds-token-validation-rules.json (DS-VALIDATE-001).
2. BR-DS-001 (error): Verify all SemanticToken values trace to a PrimitiveToken or are valid hex.
3. BR-DS-002 (error): Verify all ComponentToken references resolve to a SemanticToken @id.
4. BR-DS-003 (error): Verify DesignComponents with allowsOverrides=true have >= 1 binding.
5. BR-DS-004 (warning): If themeModeSupport=true, check SemanticTokens have both light+dark values.
6. BR-DS-005 (warning): Check FigmaSource lastSyncedAt within 7 days.
7. BR-DS-006 (error): Verify BrandVariant overrides target only PF-Instance tier tokens.
8. BR-DS-007 (error): Verify required property completeness per entity type (8 schemas).
9. BR-DS-008 (error): Verify all 14 CSS-var-required semantic token names present.
10. Generate GATE-3 report: per-rule pass/fail/warning/skip and summary counts.

pe:hasPhase.pe:description: Generate the DS instance JSONLD file and extraction log conforming to DS-ONT entity definitions.
pe:hasPhase.pe:entryConditions: Validation gate passed with zero blocking errors
pe:hasPhase.pe:exitConditions: Valid JSONLD file written; extraction log written; registry entry updated
pe:activities: 1. Assemble @graph array: DesignSystem root, TokenCategories, PrimitiveTokens[], SemanticTokens[], ComponentTokens[], BrandVariant, FigmaSource, ThemeModes, DesignPatterns.
2. Write to instance-data/{brand}-ds-instance-v{version}.jsonld.
3. Write extraction log to instance-data/{brand}-extraction-log.json with gate results and extractedNodes.
4. Update Entry-ONT-DS-001.json artifacts.instanceData[]: add brand entry with status=populated, extractedAt=today, extractionLog path, peProcessRef=PE-DS-EXTRACT-001.
5. Validate output: python3 json.load() + count @graph entities by @type.

pe:hasPhase.pe:description: Stage all generated files, commit with standard message format, handle upstream changes via rebase, push to remote, and confirm GitHub Actions workflow triggers.
pe:hasPhase.pe:entryConditions: GATE-4 passed; JSONLD, extraction log, and registry entry all written to disk
pe:hasPhase.pe:exitConditions: git push succeeds; GitHub Actions Pages workflow triggered
pe:activities: 1. Run vitest tests to confirm no regressions: npx vitest run from visualiser dir.
2. git add the 3 files: {brand}-ds-instance-v{version}.jsonld, {brand}-extraction-log.json, Entry-ONT-DS-001.json.
3. git commit with message: feat(ds): add {BRAND} brand instance data via PE-DS-EXTRACT-001.
4. git pull --rebase to incorporate any upstream changes (stash uncommitted work if needed).
5. git push to origin/main.
6. Verify push succeeded (exit code 0) and check gh run list for triggered Pages workflow.

pe:errorRecovery.rebaseFailed: Stash local changes (git stash), pull --rebase, pop stash, resolve conflicts if any, then re-commit and push.
pe:errorRecovery.pushRejected: Pull --rebase first, then push again. Never force-push to main.
pe:errorRecovery.testsFailed: Abort commit. Investigate and fix the failing test before retrying.

pe:hasPhase.pe:description: Confirm the deployed JSONLD is accessible on GitHub Pages, the registry entry reflects the new brand, and the visualiser dropdown will populate correctly.
pe:hasPhase.pe:entryConditions: GATE-5 passed; GitHub Actions workflow completed successfully
pe:hasPhase.pe:exitConditions: Live URL returns valid JSON with correct entity counts; registry entry accessible with brand listed
pe:activities: 1. Wait for GitHub Actions workflow to complete (gh run list --limit 1, check status=completed).
2. Fetch the deployed JSONLD file: https://ajrmooreuk.github.io/Azlan-EA-AAA/PBS/ONTOLOGIES/ontology-library/PE-Series/DS-ONT/instance-data/{brand}-ds-instance-v{version}.jsonld.
3. Verify HTTP 200 and valid JSON response with expected @graph entry count.
4. Fetch the deployed Entry-ONT-DS-001.json and confirm artifacts.instanceData contains the new brand entry.
5. Log verification results in extraction log (append liveVerification object).
6. Advise user to hard-refresh (Cmd+Shift+R) if they had the visualiser open during deployment — GitHub Pages CDN may cache old files for up to 10 minutes.
pe:hasPhase.pe:cdnCacheNote: GitHub Pages CDN caches files with max-age up to 600s. New files may take 1-2 minutes to propagate after workflow completion. Hard refresh (Cmd+Shift+R) bypasses browser cache.

pe:hasGate.pe:description: Verify raw extraction contains minimum viable token set
pe:hasGate.pe:criteria: At least 10 colour tokens, 3 spacing tokens, 2 radius tokens extracted

pe:hasGate.pe:description: All tokens classified into exactly one tier with valid valueType
pe:hasGate.pe:criteria: Zero unclassified tokens; all tokens have DS-ONT enum-valid valueType

pe:hasGate.pe:description: Instance data conforms to DS-ONT business rules
pe:hasGate.pe:criteria: Zero severity=error rule violations from BR-DS-001 through BR-DS-008

pe:hasGate.pe:description: Output file is valid JSON-LD with correct @context and @graph
pe:hasGate.pe:criteria: Valid JSON; @context contains ds: prefix; @graph has DesignSystem + BrandVariant + FigmaSource + at least 1 token per tier; python3 json.load() succeeds; entity counts match extraction log

pe:hasGate.pe:description: Code committed, pushed, and GitHub Actions Pages workflow completed successfully
pe:hasGate.pe:criteria: git push exit code 0; gh run list shows latest workflow status=completed/success; vitest tests pass (excluding known pre-existing failures)

pe:hasGate.pe:description: Deployed JSONLD accessible on GitHub Pages with correct content
pe:hasGate.pe:criteria: HTTP 200 from GitHub Pages URL; response parses as valid JSON; @graph entity count matches GATE-4 verified count; Entry-ONT-DS-001.json on Pages includes new brand in instanceData array

pe:augmentedBy.pe:description: Claude Code agent with Figma MCP access executing the six-phase extraction-to-deployment pipeline
pe:augmentedBy.pe:capabilities: Figma MCP (get_variable_defs, get_metadata, get_design_context); token classification; JSONLD generation; DS-ONT business rule validation; git operations (add, commit, pull --rebase, push); GitHub CLI (gh run list); HTTP verification (WebFetch)

pe:measures.pe:formula: PHASE-6 completion timestamp - PHASE-1 start timestamp
GATE-6 verified timestamp - git push timestamp

pe:relatedProcesses.pe:description: Hand-authored JSONLD defining application layout (zones, nav layers, components). Separate concern from token extraction — skeletons are structural, tokens are visual.

pe:versionHistory.pe:changes: Initial 4-phase pipeline: Extract, Classify, Validate, Populate. 4 gates, 1 agent, 2 metrics. Manual commit/push/verify steps required after Phase 4.

Added Phase 5 (Commit & Deploy) and Phase 6 (Live Verification) with GATE-5 and GATE-6. Added explicit inputs schema, error recovery procedures, CDN cache advisory, known Figma template patterns, and 2 new operational metrics. Automation level raised from 90% to 98%. Eliminates all manual post-population steps.

Fixed Phase 1 extraction strategy: get_metadata FIRST to discover section node IDs, THEN get_variable_defs per section. Root page 0:1 returns empty — section-level targeting required. Updated known patterns with verified BAIV node IDs and actual token yield (~134 deduplicated). Promoted get_variable_defs from fallback to primary extraction method.

Added pe:relatedProcesses cross-reference to PE-DS-EXTRACT-002 (Application Skeleton Authoring Pipeline). Clarifies the separation of concerns: token extraction (automated, from Figma) vs skeleton authoring (manual, hand-authored JSONLD).
